seasons.rule3: Cancellations must be made at least 24 hours in advance
seasons.rule4: Repeated no-shows may result in the seasonal booking being revoked

help.title: Help
help.subject: Subject
help.faqBookingQ1: How do I book a venue?
help.faqBookingA1: Go to the listing overview, select the desired venue and date, and click "Book now". You will receive confirmation by email.
help.faqBookingQ2: Can I change or cancel a booking?
help.faqBookingA2: Yes, you can change or cancel bookings up to 24 hours before. Go to "My bookings" and select the booking.
help.faqBookingA3: Payment is usually made by invoice. For some venues, direct payment may be available.
help.faqAccountQ1: How do I create an account?
help.faqAccountA1: Click "Register" and fill out the form with your name, email and password.
help.faqAccountQ2: How do I change my password?
help.faqAccountA2: Go to Settings > Security and click "Change password".
help.faqOrgQ1: How do I create an organization?
help.faqOrgA1: Go to Organization > New organization and fill in the organization information.
help.faqOrgA2: Under Organization > Members you can invite new members via email.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about tickets, payment and more
faq.noResults: No results for your search. Try a different keyword.
faq.ticketsA1: Go to the event you want to see, select the number of tickets and ticket type, and complete the purchase at checkout. You will receive the tickets by email after payment.
faq.ticketsA2: Exchanging tickets is usually possible up to 48 hours before the event. Go to "My Tickets" on My Page and select the ticket you want to exchange. Note that there may be a price difference.
faq.ticketsQ3: What if I lose my ticket?
faq.ticketsA3: Don't worry! Log in to My Page and find the ticket under "My Tickets". You can resend it to yourself by email. You can also display the ticket directly from the app.
faq.ticketsQ4: Can I transfer tickets to someone else?
faq.ticketsA4: Yes, you can transfer tickets to others. Go to "My Tickets", select the ticket and press "Transfer". The recipient will receive the ticket by email.
faq.paymentA1: We offer payment with Vipps, bank card (Visa/Mastercard) and gift cards. For organizations, invoicing is also available.
faq.paymentQ2: How do I get a refund?
faq.paymentA2: Upon cancellation within the deadline, the amount is automatically refunded to the original payment method within 5-10 business days. For gift cards, the amount is credited back to the gift card.
faq.paymentQ3: Can I use a gift card together with another payment method?
faq.paymentA3: Yes, you can combine gift cards with other payment methods. The remaining balance on the gift card is deducted first, and any remaining amount is paid with another method.
faq.accountA1: Kulturhusvenn is our membership that gives you benefits such as discounts on tickets (approx. 20%), access to presale, and exclusive events. The membership can be purchased under "Membership" on My Page.
faq.accountQ2: How do I use a gift card?
faq.accountA2: At checkout, you can add a gift card by entering the gift card code. The amount is deducted from the gift card. Gift cards are valid for 4 years from the date of purchase.
faq.eventsA1: Browse our program on the front page. You can filter by category (concerts, theater, comedy, etc.), date and price. You can also use the search field at the top.
faq.eventsQ2: Can I get notifications about new events?
faq.eventsA2: Yes! Enable notifications under Settings > Notification Settings on My Page. You can choose to receive notifications by email or push notification for new events in categories you are interested in.
faq.generalA1: Yes, we offer accessible seating. When ordering, you can select companion seats and wheelchair seats where available. Contact us for special needs.
faq.generalA2: Age restrictions vary by event and are listed on the event page. Children under a certain age may need a companion. See the details for each event.

about.title: About us
about.description: Learn more about who we are and what we do.
about.missionText: We believe culture and experiences should be accessible to everyone. Our platform makes it easy for venues, organizers and audiences to connect — with modern tools for ticketing, bookings and membership.
about.teamText: We are a dedicated team of developers, designers and culture enthusiasts working to create the best possible experience for our users and partners.
about.contactText: Have questions or want to learn more? Reach out to us — we would love to hear from you.

hero.title: Build production-ready SaaS without rebuilding the same systems
hero.subtitle: Authentication, multi-tenancy, billing, automation, AI, and compliance — all built-in. A production-grade SaaS platform core for building scalable, multi-tenant, AI-ready applications.
hero.bullet1: Multi-tenant architecture out of the box
hero.bullet2: Realtime backend with zero API boilerplate

problem.title: Building SaaS is not about features
problem.text: It's about everything around them: auth, billing, permissions, infrastructure, integrations… This starter kit gives you a complete SaaS foundation, so you can focus on your actual product — not rebuilding the same systems every time.
problem.cardText: Every SaaS project starts by rebuilding the same things: auth, billing, permissions, tenant isolation, notifications, integrations…

modules.title: What You Get
modules.identityDesc: Secure authentication, organizations, roles, and permissions — ready for real-world SaaS.
modules.billingDesc: Integrated subscription system with feature gating and plan management.
modules.resourcesDesc: Flexible entity system with relationships, ownership, and lifecycle states.
modules.notificationsDesc: In-app and email notifications powered by event-driven architecture.
modules.automationDesc: Background jobs, scheduled tasks, and webhook-driven processes.
modules.integrationsDesc: Connect external APIs, manage webhooks, and extend your SaaS easily.
modules.analyticsDesc: Track usage, monitor activity, and gain insights into your product.
modules.securityDesc: Audit logs, data privacy controls, and tenant isolation built-in.
modules.aiDesc: Plug in AI workflows, prompts, and automation without redesigning your system.
modules.classificationDesc: Hierarchical categories, tags, and custom attributes for organizing any entity.
modules.searchDesc: Full-text search, faceted filtering, and typeahead across all entities.
modules.i18nDesc: Multi-language support with runtime switching and RTL layout.
modules.subtitle: 17 production modules covering every aspect of a modern SaaS platform.

stack.title: Why React + Vite + Convex?
stack.convex: Realtime backend with Convex — no REST complexity
stack.subtitle: No legacy baggage. Every tool chosen for developer experience and production performance.

audience.title: Who It's For
audience.developers: Developers tired of rebuilding auth & billing
audience.teams: Teams building internal tools or platforms
audience.foundersDesc: Skip months of infrastructure work and launch your SaaS faster.
audience.developersDesc: Stop rebuilding auth, billing, and permissions from scratch.
audience.teamsDesc: Get a proven foundation for internal tools and platforms.
audience.agenciesDesc: Deliver white-labeled SaaS products to clients efficiently.

steps.title: How It Works
steps.cloneDesc: Get the full codebase with one command.
steps.configureDesc: Set up auth, billing, and branding via environment variables.
steps.buildDesc: Focus on what makes your SaaS unique.

cta.title: Stop rebuilding the same SaaS foundation
cta.subtitle: Join developers who ship faster with a proven, tested foundation.

solution.cardText: Start with a complete SaaS foundation. 20 production-ready components, 17 modules, full test coverage. Focus on what makes your product unique.

tech.react: Component-driven UI with hooks and concurrent features
tech.vite: Instant HMR, optimized builds, native ESM
tech.typescript: End-to-end type safety from database to UI

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can I use this for commercial projects?
faq.a1: Yes. The starter kit is designed for production use. You own the code and can customize it freely.
faq.a2: Absolutely. Built on Convex with component isolation, event-driven architecture, and per-tenant data scoping.
faq.a3: Yes. Every component, hook, route, and style is yours to modify. No vendor lock-in on the application layer.
faq.a4: Yes, from day one. Tenant isolation is enforced at every layer: database, functions, SDK, and UI.
faq.a5: Yes. WebMCP tools expose your SaaS functions to AI agents. The architecture is ready for LLM integration, RAG, and AI workflows.
